_comment: Project-shared Claude Code settings. Hooks wire the Bhishma write_scope check (PreToolUse) and structured trace recording (PostToolUse). Both hooks are opt-in via the BHISHMA_AGENT environment variable: they no-op in Kartavya's interactive sessions (where BHISHMA_AGENT is unset) and activate in agent runners that export it. See lib/README.md for full activation discipline. Constitutional R23 wiring authorized by Kartavya 2026-05-12 00:04 IST under auto-mode override; first Sahadeva audit at 10:00 IST 2026-05-17 should confirm or revert.
